subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath revealed, in recounting the most grievous tribulations, that which causeth the Tablet to lament and the Pen of God to weep [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در ذکر مصائب کبری نازل نمود آنچه را که لوح نوحه نمود و قلم الله
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
